en_title: Gabe Newell Says Players Have 'Enormous Choice' When Pressed on Steam Monopoly Accusations, Report Says
cn_title: Gabe Newell否认Steam垄断指控：玩家选择多
subtitle: 选择多得很
opus_summary: 据彭博社报道，Valve创始人兼总裁Gabe Newell在反垄断诉讼中否认Steam垄断指控，称玩家在PC游戏领域有「巨大选择权」。他指出玩家可在Xbox、Steam、Epic Games Store或开发商处购买游戏。尽管Steam用户五年增长60%，同时在线约4200万，但Newell表示Valve不限制其他平台定价。目前Valve还面临英国6.56亿英镑(约合人民币60亿元)集体诉讼等多起法律挑战。

paragraphs.en: Valve founder and president Gabe Newell denied claims that Steam is running a monopoly, saying that players have "enormous choice" in the PC gaming space, according to a new report.
paragraphs.cn: 据一份新报道，Valve创始人兼总裁Gabe Newell否认了Steam构成垄断的指控，称玩家在PC游戏领域拥有「巨大选择权」。

paragraphs.en: Bloomberg shared the tech company figurehead's thoughts in a report covering documents brought to light from an ongoing antitrust lawsuit filed against his company. In it, the site covers allegations that the Steam marketplace holds an illegal monopoly on the industry, as well as Newell's response to those claims.
paragraphs.cn: 彭博社在一篇报道中分享了这位科技公司掌门人的想法，该报道涉及针对其公司提起的一起反垄断诉讼中披露的文件。文中涵盖了Steam市场在该行业拥有非法垄断地位的指控，以及Newell对这些指控的回应。

paragraphs.en: Valve denied any wrongdoing in the suit, with the company's boss refuting accusations by stating that gamers across PC and consoles don't have to go to Steam for their games.
paragraphs.cn: Valve在诉讼中否认有任何不当行为，公司老板反驳指控时表示，PC和主机玩家不必非得到Steam购买游戏。
「客户拥有巨大的选择权，」Newell说道。

paragraphs.en: Elaborating, he added that players can choose "where they purchase their products, whether they buy the game on an Xbox, whether they buy it on Steam, whether they buy it on Epic Games Store or whether they buy it directly from software developers."
paragraphs.cn: 他进一步阐述道，玩家可以选择「在何处购买产品，无论是在Xbox上购买游戏，还是在Steam上购买，在Epic Games Store上购买，还是直接从软件开发商处购买」。

paragraphs.en: Valve's Steam has been considered by many to be the go-to marketplace for digital PC gaming for more than a decade. As noted by Bloomberg, its time at the top of the food chain has seen it grow its user base by 60% in the last five years, with around 42 million gamers playing any one of its games at any particular moment.
paragraphs.cn: 十多年来，Valve的Steam一直被许多人视为PC数字游戏的首选市场。正如彭博社所指出的，其处于食物链顶端的时间使其用户群在过去五年中增长了60%，在任何特定时刻都有约4200万玩家在玩其平台上的游戏。

paragraphs.en: With Valve clearly positioned atop the throne, and with monopoly allegations frequently hurled its way, many other publishers have tried to cut into its power through years. The most famous example is likely , which . However, despite routinely offering free games to entice players to use its store as an alternative , it's never managed to knock Valve down from .
paragraphs.cn: 随着Valve稳坐王座，垄断指控也频频袭来，多年来许多其他发行商试图削弱其势力。最著名的例子可能是Epic Games Store，它定期提供免费游戏来吸引玩家使用其商店作为替代，但始终未能将Valve从宝座上拉下来。

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere in the report, Newell argued against accusations that Valve enforces a policy that discourages other publishers from cheaper pricing options on non-Steam digital retailers. The supposed policy accuses Steam of using aggressive tactics against publishers, such as Ubisoft and Warner Bros. Interactive , in order to maintain its position in PC gamers' minds.
paragraphs.cn: 在报道的其他部分，Newell反驳了关于Valve执行一项政策、阻止其他发行商在非Steam数字零售商上提供更便宜定价的指控。该所谓政策指责Steam对育碧和华纳兄弟互动等发行商采取激进策略，以维持其在PC玩家心中的地位。

paragraphs.en: Newell said his company "does not have a policy or practice of dictating prices to third-party software developers on other platforms," according to a transcript from his deposition shared by Bloomberg.
paragraphs.cn: 根据彭博社分享的证词记录，Newell表示他的公司「没有制定政策或做法，向其他平台上的第三方软件开发商规定价格」。

paragraphs.en: "Many of our partners and many of our customers are quite happy with the service that we’re providing," the transcript continued.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们的许多合作伙伴和许多客户对我们提供的服务相当满意，」证词记录继续说道。

paragraphs.en: Valve has repeatedly found itself in legal crosshairs in 2026. As the aforementioned antitrust lawsuit continues, in January a UK tribunal gave the green light to a £656 million ($901 million) collective action lawsuit targeting Valve over monopoly concerns. On top of this, New York Attorney General Letitia James in February and, in April, the Australian government issued Valve a legally enforceable transparency notice to have the company detail how its systems intend to prevent child grooming and radicalization on the Steam platform.
paragraphs.cn: 2026年，Valve屡屡成为法律靶心。在上述反垄断诉讼进行的同时，今年1月，英国一家法庭批准了一项针对Valve的6.56亿英镑(约合人民币60亿元)集体诉讼，涉及垄断问题。除此之外，纽约州总检察长Letitia James在2月采取了行动，4月澳大利亚政府向Valve发出了具有法律效力的透明度通知，要求该公司详细说明其系统如何防止Steam平台上的儿童诱骗和极端化行为。

paragraphs.en: Photo by Olly Curtis/Future Publishing via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 图片来源：Olly Curtis/Future Publishing via Getty Images。
